---
title: "Founded on Paper, or, Uphill and Downhill between the Two Jubilees. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘Under the Storm,’ ‘The Carbonels,’ etc."
---

## Founded on Paper, or, Uphill and Downhill between the Two Jubilees. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘Under the Storm,’ ‘The Carbonels,’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** October 1897
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

### Notes

This is a sequel to <i>The Carbonels.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
